uk: 🕃 Св. священномученика Григорія, єпископа Великої Вірменії.
saints.en: Hieromartyr Gregory, Bishop of Greater Armenia

rubrics:
Вечірня: катизма чергова. На «Господи, взиваю» - 6 стихир свщмч., Сл.: свщмч, І нині: хрестобогород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар свщмч., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря свщмч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. свщмч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар свщмч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря свщмч. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і свщмч. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний свщмч., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар свщмч., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря свщмч. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. свщмч.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – свщмч.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – Флп. 237 зач.; 1, 12-20. Єв. – Лк. 21 зач.; 5, 33-39.

troparion_en.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, / O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, / you defended the Faith, even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Gregory entreat Christ God to save our souls.

kontakion_en.text: Today, let us the faithful, praise with songs and hymns / the admirable hierarch Gregory as an initiate in the sacred mysteries. / He was a contender for the truth, a vigilant pastor and teacher, / a light for the whole world, / interceding with Christ that our souls may be saved!

matched_oca_saint: Hieromartyr Gregory, Bishop of Greater Armenia, Equal of the Apostles, Enlightener of Armenia

oca_saints.name: Hieromartyr Gregory, Bishop of Greater Armenia, Equal of the Apostles, Enlightener of Armenia

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, / O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, / you defended the Faith, even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Gregory entreat Christ God to save our souls.

kontakion.text: Today, let us the faithful, praise with songs and hymns / the admirable hierarch Gregory as an initiate in the sacred mysteries. / He was a contender for the truth, a vigilant pastor and teacher, / a light for the whole world, / interceding with Christ that our souls may be saved!

oca_saints.name: Venerable Gregory, Abbot of Pelsheme and Wonderworker of Vologda

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Gregory, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Saint Michael, first Metropolitan of Kiev

troparion.text: The prophecy of the first-called apostle has been fulfilled today: / Grace has illumined the hills of Kiev and the faith is increased. / Those who were not a people / are now the people of God, a holy nation, / a flock of Christ of which you, O Michael, are first shepherd, / and you serve it by bringing baptism. / O Hierarch, standing before God pray that all may be saved!

kontakion.text: You appeared as a second Moses, / bringing the vine from Egyptian idolatry into the land of promise. / You said of it: Faith shall be established in this land, / and fruit to nourish the world shall flourish on the summits of Kiev, / more than on the heights of Lebanon. / Having this harvest we bless you, O Hierarch Michael!

oca_saints.name: Martyrs Rhipsime and Gaianḗ of Armenia and those with them

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs, O Lord,  /  through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God.  /  For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries,  /  and shattered the powerless boldness of demons.  /  Through their intercessions, save our souls!
